# Date Created: 2021-03-11

#  Description: Register guest virtio device driver in offline image

#       Return: 0 if successfully, other with errors

#suse12_initrd_decompress_and_modify 
z0GreenInstall.suse12_initrd_decompress_and_modifyc
        1. backup initrdfile
        2. mkdir initrdfile tmp dir
        3. file initrdfile suse11 diff from suse12
        4. get "ASCII cpio arch ive ASCII cpio archive" file
        5. decompress initrdfile
            xz compressed data    suse12
        6. cp virtio_scsi.ko or virtio_blk.ko to ./lib/module/kernel/drivers/
        r

            1. don't have /etc/X11/xorg.conf
               return
            2. have /etc/X11/xorg.conf and not have /etc/X11/xorg.conf.BeforeVMwareToolsInstall
                replace "Driver      "vmware"" then copy in
            3. have /etc/X11/xorg.conf and /etc/X11/xorg.conf.BeforeVMwareToolsInstall
                cp /etc/X11/xorg.conf.BeforeVMwareToolsInstall to local
                replace local xorg.conf "Driver      "vmware""
                copy local xorg.conf to replace xorg.conf.BeforeVMwareToolsInstall and xorg.conf
